ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic sequence */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The genetic sequence itself */,
  "count" INTEGER /* The number of times this sequence has been observed */,
  "species" TEXT /* The species from which the sequence is derived */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the sequence (e.g., lab, public database) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* The length of the sequence */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date the sequence was created or uploaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the sequence was last modified */,
  "owner_user_id" INTEGER /* The user who owns or is responsible for the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_owner_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obs_exp_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observed/expected ratio record */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genetic sequence */,
  "overall_ratio" REAL /* The overall observed/expected ratio for the sequence */,
  "window_size" INTEGER /* The size of the window used to calculate the observed/expected ratio */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method used to calculate the observed/expected ratio */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* The confidence interval for the observed/expected ratio */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* The date when the ratio was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obs_exp_ratios_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "max_obs_exp" (
  "max_ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the maximum observed/expected ratio record */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genetic sequence */,
  "max_ratio" REAL /* The maximum observed/expected ratio for the sequence */,
  "position" INTEGER /* The position within the sequence where the maximum ratio occurs */,
  "window_size" INTEGER /* The size of the window used to calculate the maximum observed/expected ratio */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method used to calculate the maximum observed/expected ratio */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* The confidence interval for the maximum observed/expected ratio */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* The date when the maximum ratio was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("max_ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_max_obs_exp_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department to which the user belongs */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* The device used to access the sequence (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_access_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genetic sequence analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* The type of analysis performed (e.g., pattern detection, mutation analysis) */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method used for the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* The parameters used for the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the analysis (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis that generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was published */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "format" TEXT /* The format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis where collaboration took place */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., lead researcher, contributor) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)
